html, body {
  height: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  background: transparent;
  font-family: Inter, "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
}

body {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 0;
}

#editor-shell {
  min-height: calc(var(--appsmith-ui-height) * 1px - 4px);
}

#editor {
  visibility: hidden;
}

.tox-tinymce {
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: var(--appsmith-theme-boxShadow);
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: calc(var(--appsmith-ui-height) * 1px - 4px);
}

.tox .tox-edit-area__iframe,
.tox .tox-edit-area::before {
  background: #fff;
}

const widgetState = {
  editor: null,
  applyingModel: false,
  lastNonce: null,
  lastHtml: null,
};

function getModelHtml() {
  return typeof appsmith.model?.html === "string" ? appsmith.model.html : "";
}

function getModelNonce() {
  return String(appsmith.model?.nonce ?? "");
}

function ensureShell() {
  const root = document.getElementById("root");
  root.innerHTML = '<div id="editor-shell"><textarea id="editor"></textarea></div>';
  return document.getElementById("editor");
}

function pushHtml(html) {
  if (widgetState.applyingModel) {
    return;
  }
  widgetState.lastHtml = html;
  appsmith.updateModel({ html, nonce: getModelNonce() });
}

function syncFromModel(force) {
  const editor = widgetState.editor;
  if (!editor) {
    return;
  }

  const nextHtml = getModelHtml();
  const nextNonce = getModelNonce();
  const currentHtml = editor.getContent() || "";

  if (!force && nextNonce === widgetState.lastNonce && nextHtml === currentHtml) {
    return;
  }

  widgetState.applyingModel = true;
  editor.setContent(nextHtml || "");
  widgetState.applyingModel = false;
  widgetState.lastNonce = nextNonce;
  widgetState.lastHtml = nextHtml;
}

function buildEditor() {
  const target = ensureShell();

  tinymce.init({
    target,
    inline: false,
    menubar: false,
    promotion: false,
    branding: false,
    statusbar: true,
    toolbar_mode: "sliding",
    resize: true,
    min_height: 420,
    plugins: "autolink advlist lists link code table",
    toolbar:
      "undo redo | blocks | bold italic underline | forecolor backcolor | alignleft aligncenter alignright | bullist numlist | link table | removeformat code",
    skin: false,
    content_css: false,
    content_style:
      "body{font-family:Inter,Segoe UI,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.55;padding:14px;} p{margin:0 0 12px;} table{border-collapse:collapse;} td,th{border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:6px 8px;}",
    setup(editor) {
      widgetState.editor = editor;
      editor.on("init", () => {
        const container = editor.getContainer();
        if (container) {
          container.style.visibility = "visible";
        }
        syncFromModel(true);
        editor.focus();
      });
      editor.on("change input undo redo setcontent keyup", () => {
        pushHtml(editor.getContent() || "");
      });
    },
  });
}

appsmith.onReady(() => {
  buildEditor();
});

appsmith.onModelChange(() => {
  syncFromModel(false);
});

html, body {
  height: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  background: transparent;
  font-family: Inter, "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
}

body {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 0;
}

#editor-shell {
  min-height: calc(var(--appsmith-ui-height) * 1px - 4px);
}

#editor {
  visibility: hidden;
}

.tox-tinymce {
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: var(--appsmith-theme-boxShadow);
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: calc(var(--appsmith-ui-height) * 1px - 4px);
}

.tox .tox-edit-area__iframe,
.tox .tox-edit-area::before {
  background: #fff;
}

const widgetState = {
  editor: null,
  applyingModel: false,
  lastNonce: null,
  lastHtml: null,
};

function getModelHtml() {
  return typeof appsmith.model?.html === "string" ? appsmith.model.html : "";
}

function getModelNonce() {
  return String(appsmith.model?.nonce ?? "");
}

function ensureShell() {
  const root = document.getElementById("root");
  root.innerHTML = '<div id="editor-shell"><textarea id="editor"></textarea></div>';
  return document.getElementById("editor");
}

function pushHtml(html) {
  if (widgetState.applyingModel) {
    return;
  }
  widgetState.lastHtml = html;
  appsmith.updateModel({ html, nonce: getModelNonce() });
}

function syncFromModel(force) {
  const editor = widgetState.editor;
  if (!editor) {
    return;
  }

  const nextHtml = getModelHtml();
  const nextNonce = getModelNonce();
  const currentHtml = editor.getContent() || "";

  if (!force && nextNonce === widgetState.lastNonce && nextHtml === currentHtml) {
    return;
  }

  widgetState.applyingModel = true;
  editor.setContent(nextHtml || "");
  widgetState.applyingModel = false;
  widgetState.lastNonce = nextNonce;
  widgetState.lastHtml = nextHtml;
}

function buildEditor() {
  const target = ensureShell();

  tinymce.init({
    target,
    inline: false,
    menubar: false,
    promotion: false,
    branding: false,
    statusbar: true,
    toolbar_mode: "sliding",
    resize: true,
    min_height: 420,
    plugins: "autolink advlist lists link code table",
    toolbar:
      "undo redo | blocks | bold italic underline | forecolor backcolor | alignleft aligncenter alignright | bullist numlist | link table | removeformat code",
    skin: false,
    content_css: false,
    content_style:
      "body{font-family:Inter,Segoe UI,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.55;padding:14px;} p{margin:0 0 12px;} table{border-collapse:collapse;} td,th{border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:6px 8px;}",
    setup(editor) {
      widgetState.editor = editor;
      editor.on("init", () => {
        const container = editor.getContainer();
        if (container) {
          container.style.visibility = "visible";
        }
        syncFromModel(true);
        editor.focus();
      });
      editor.on("change input undo redo setcontent keyup", () => {
        pushHtml(editor.getContent() || "");
      });
    },
  });
}

appsmith.onReady(() => {
  buildEditor();
});

appsmith.onModelChange(() => {
  syncFromModel(false);
});
